nl_query: Count active script assignments per evaluator.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS evaluator_name, COUNT(sa.id) AS active_assignments
FROM faculty_cache fc
JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
WHERE sa.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY fc.name
ORDER BY active_assignments DESC
error: Validation failed (aggregation): GROUP BY uses a descriptive column (like name, title, or code) without including the primary key (id). Names and titles may not be unique. Always include the entity's 'id' column in the GROUP BY clause alongside the descriptive column.
